content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 79% deployed against 80% cap — almost no room for new entries. Multiple positions are sitting without stop-losses which is the more urgent problem. VIX at 18.4 elevated; IT sector cracking (HCLTECH -10%, INFY results pending) while Power/Pharma/FMCG rotating up. Priority this tick is risk-framing existing book, not adding.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position down 4.7% but research confirms record Q4 (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 0.13%, CASA 52.5%). Thesis intact; stock at 52w high territory. Setting SL at 74 (~4.7% below CMP, below recent swing low 72.3) and target 88 (above 52w high). RR roughly 1:2.5 from CMP."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 beat, PAT +19%, GNPA sub-1%, multiple analyst TP upgrades to Rs 1,160-1,350. Up 10.8% today. Setting SL at 945 (below today's low 981 buffer, protects entry) and target 1140 near prior 52w high / analyst TP band. RR ~1:2.3."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge position. Gold supportive structurally (Goldman $5400, JPM $5055). Near-term soft post-Akshaya Tritiya. SL 119 (~4.3% below, below April range lows), target 135 (near 52w high region). Position is insurance — wide stop justified."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1625.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 3.3%, broke out to 52w high on 2.3x volume. Trail SL to 1625 (near entry 1650, just below today's low 1645) to lock in near-breakeven. Target 1850 based on sector momentum + Nabha deal. Protects against reversal in power sector if Adani Power Q4 disappoints 29-Apr."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1525.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Q4 blowout (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%, 18% volume growth). Stock at fresh 52w high. SL 1355 (~4% below, below today's low 1382 buffer), target 1525 (~8% upside). Quality defensive hold; P/E rich but growth justifies."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Strong provisional Q4 update (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%). Board meeting/results on 27-Apr. SL 1005 (below today's low 1035, just below entry), target 1150 toward analyst TP band Rs 1,100-1,200. Binary event risk in 2 trading days — hold through with tight SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "new_target": 745.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Volume 3.7x with pattern confirmation (hammer + bullish engulfing). Q4 results 29-Apr, analyst consensus buy Rs 700-750. FDA overhang is real risk. SL 655 (just below 20DMA region), target 745 (near analyst TP). Tight structure given uncertainty."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2285.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Defensive FMCG hold into 30-Apr Q4 results. UBS Buy reiterated. SL 2285 (below today's low 2336 buffer), target 2550 (toward analyst consensus Rs 2607). RR ~1:2."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Just broke out above 52w high Rs 400.85. Summer demand thesis + 15-May Q4 results. SL 388 (below breakout level / today's low 400), target 435 (value-recovery toward Rs 448 52w high prior). Positive trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 200.00,
      "new_target": 240.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "At all-time high, extended +44% in April. Q4 results 29-Apr are binary — Q3 PAT was -18.89% YoY, sell-on-news risk real. Shooting star candle yesterday. SL at 200 (tight, just below today's low 212.5 buffer to psychological level), target 240. Must exit before/on result day if not triggered — will revisit 28-Apr."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DATAPATTNS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+20% single-day move to ATH — chase territory. Not adding. Book already has defence/power cluster via TORNTPOWER+ADANIPOWER+NTPC. Will watch for consolidation/pullback entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "OFSS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 beat but book at 79% deployed. Only Rs 14.4K deployable vs required lot size (1 share = Rs 8,815). Can't size meaningfully. IT sector also under broader pressure (HCLTECH -10%, INFY result risk). Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CIPLA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish research — Q3 PAT -57%, USFDA 483 observations at Goa, -20% YTD. Today's bounce is sector reflex, not company-specific. Already have GRANULES pharma exposure. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.25,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52w low, -10.12%, weak FY27 guide 1-4%, structural IT headwinds. Classic falling knife. INFY result tonight could compound. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q3 PAT -19.5%, pipeline delay, petchem margin pressure. Research BEARISH net. Already have energy/power cluster exposure via NTPC/ADANIPOWER/TORNTPOWER. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact; framing SL at 74 given position was entered without stops."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in protection after 10.8% up day."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Insurance position; wide SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1625.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to near-breakeven after breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "reasoning": "Set SL framework; Q4 earnings 30-Apr."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold through 27-Apr results with tight SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "reasoning": "Volume confirmation; Q4 on 29-Apr."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2285.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hold into 30-Apr Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout above 52w high; trail below breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 200.00,
      "reasoning": "ATH + shooting star + binary Q4 on 29-Apr — tight trail to protect."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS genuine quality setup but capital-constrained; revisit if profit-taking creates room. DATAPATTNS — wait for pullback to Rs 3,700-3,800 zone for lower-risk entry. HCLTECH avoid until post-INFY reaction stabilizes. JIOFINL/RVNL didn't make this batch; re-scan next pulse.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Critical housekeeping this tick: all 10 positions had zero SLs recorded — framed them all now. Book at 79% deployed with Rs 14K deployable leaves no practical room for new entries. Cluster check: Power/Energy (TORNTPOWER+NTPC+ADANIPOWER+GOLDBEES via macro) ~25-27% of book — at the ~20% cluster threshold, not adding more. Financials (MAHABANK+PNBHOUSING+AUBANK) ~27% — also capped. Heavy earnings week ahead: AUBANK 27-Apr, ADANIPOWER/GRANULES 29-Apr, HINDUNILVR/NESTLE/NTPC in May. Will need to tighten or trim into these events. Disposition: preservation/management, no new adds."
}
